title: thuja occidentalis f. ericoides
intro: Thuja occidentalis f. ericoides, also known as Eastern White Cedar Ericoides, is a shrubby evergreen variant of the Eastern White Cedar tree. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, derived from its essential oils and terpenoids. Thuja occidentalis f. ericoides is used to support the health benefits of reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, often used to promote relaxation and immune system function.
